workbook_name: Payment Scheduling and Fund Management Process
description: Workbook 3 — Manages Fidelity Bank interface, milestone billing, and fund clearance
source_files: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

documents.source_file: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

cells.I: The central Hub tracking all active invoices,overdue accounts,and expected cash flows across all projects.
The isolated financial terms directly extracted from the Executed Contract (D2.12) to serve as the baseline for the Finance Team.
The master schedule tracking when each milestone payment is expected versus when it actually clears.
The internal notification from Engineering to Finance confirming a technical milestone is met and an invoice can be generated.
The initial invoice generated by Finance,ensuring all tax,currency,and milestone amounts match D3.1.
The locked invoice,verified by the Head of Finance to guarantee no margin errors before client transmission.
The dispatch log recording exactly when the invoice was emailed to the client.
Internal daily check mechanism to cross-reference incoming bank transfers against outstanding invoices.
The formal financial record proving that a specific bank transfer perfectly matches a specific invoice.
The official acknowledgement sent to the client confirming their funds have been securely received.
The critical internal trigger sent from Finance to Engineering, officially unblocking the next phase of technical work.
The escalation record for invoices exceeding the 21-day payment window, triggering collection protocols.

documents.source_file: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

cells.H: [e.g. All prices are exclusive of 15% VAT]

cells.A: Has the Finance Officer reviewed and accepted this extraction?

cells.A: D3.3 MILESTONE BILLING TRIGGER (Engineering to Finance)

cells.E: [Insert Hyperlink to signed client approval document or CAD sign-off]

cells.A: Has the client formally accepted this milestone deliverable?
Are there any outstanding engineering disputes regarding this phase?

cells.E: [Proceed to D3.4 Draft Invoice / Rejected back to PM]

documents.source_file: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

cells.A: Draft Complete and ready for Head of Finance Approval (D3.5)?:

documents.source_file: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

cells.B: Does the Total Amount perfectly match the milestone value in D3.1?
Are the VAT/Tax calculations legally compliant and accurate?
Are IMHO GEN's bank details (Fidelity Bank / KNUST Branch) correct?
Is the 21-day payment window explicitly stated?

cells.A: Has the approved invoice been exported as a static, non-editable PDF?
Is the locked PDF named according to standard convention (e.g. IMHO_INV26_002_ClientName)?
Is the Invoice locked and authorized for client transmittal (D3.6)?

documents.source_file: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

cells.E: [Exact file name of PDF from D3.5]

cells.A: We are pleased to inform you that [Insert Milestone, e.g., Phase 1 Engineering] has been successfully completed and approved.

Please find attached Invoice [Insert Inv #] for the amount of [Insert Amount GHS] covering this milestone. As per our Engineering Services Agreement, payment is due within 21 days of this notice (by [Payment Due Date]).

Funds can be transferred to our Fidelity Bank account as detailed on the attached invoice. Please reply to this email with a copy of the payment transfer receipt once completed so we can promptly reconcile the account and authorize the engineering team to begin the next phase.
Thank you for your continued partnership.

documents.source_file: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

cells.A: D3.7 DAILY BANK STATEMENT LOG (Internal Reconciliation Scan)
2.0 INCOMING FUNDS DETECTED (Scan for this specific project)
Were any funds deposited by [Client Name] in the last 24 hours?
Does the deposited amount exactly match the Expected Amount in D3.6?

cells.D: [If they underpaid due to bank fees, log it here e.g. -15.00 GHS]

cells.E: [If funds arrived: Proceed to D3.8 Reconciled Payment Log / If no funds: Continue waiting]

documents.source_file: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

cells.A: D3.8 RECONCILED PAYMENT LOG (Internal Ledger Update)
2.0 MATCHING & VERIFICATION (Connecting the Bank to the Invoice)
Are the funds fully accounted for and legally belonging to IMHO GEN?
Has the invoice status been changed to "PAID" in the central database?
Has the revenue been officially logged against the specific project ledger?
Reconciliation Complete and Ready for Receipt Generation (D3.9)?:

documents.source_file: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

cells.A: This email serves as official confirmation that IMHOGEN LTD has successfully received your payment of [Insert Amount GHS] regarding Invoice [Insert Inv #].
Please find your official payment receipt attached for your accounting records.

cells.B: we are immediately issuing a Phase Unblock Notice to our engineering team to commence the next stage of development. Your Project Manager will be in touch shortly with technical updates.

cells.A: Thank you for your prompt payment and continued trust in our services.

documents.source_file: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

cells.A: D3.10 PHASE UNBLOCK NOTICE (Finance to Engineering)
Are there any financial holds remaining on this project?
Has the central tracking database been updated to "Active Engineering Phase"?
Has the Project Manager formally acknowledged receipt of this Unblock Notice?
Is the Engineering Team officially authorized to resume billable work?

documents.source_file: 03RDBI_IMHO GEN PAYMENT SCHEDULING AND FUND MANAGEMENT PHASE.xlsx

cells.R: [e.g. Client stated waiting on internal signatures]

cells.A: Has a revised invoice including penalties been issued?
Is this account being escalated to the Head of Operations for legal/collection action?
Has the PM been notified to immediately halt all engineering work?
